title: A Visitor's Guide to West Seattle
content: Explore vibrant West Seattle from our expertly managed vacation rental, perfectly positioned for city adventures and local charm in the heart of Seattle. Nestled between the Puget Sound, the Cascade Range and the Olympic Mountains, Seattle offers the best of both worlds – a striking city with iconic landmarks, world-famous attractions and an energetic vibe combined with spectacular beauty, jaw-dropping mountain views and natural attractions. West Seattle is one of Seattle’s most appealing and scenic neighborhoods with an expansive waterfront, laid back beach town vibe, stunning views of the mountains and city, and easy access to downtown Seattle’s top attractions. ## **Alki Beach Park**. Alki Beach Park is Seattle’s closest beach stretching for two miles from Duwamish Head to the Alki Point Lighthouse. Hamilton Viewpoint Park is a tiny park up a steep road from Alki Beach Park. The main shopping and dining in West Seattle is waterfront on Alki Avenue, along California and Fauntleroy Avenues and at the West Seattle Junction, the heart of “downtown” and a top Seattle attraction.

title: Beneath the Streets Photos - Yelp
content: The tour was fantastic and very informative. The in-sidewalk installations of prisms from above and below viewpoints was fascinating. Very nice tour guide.

title: West Seattle - Visit Seattle
content: # West Seattle. In the West Seattle neighborhood, a person wearing a denim apron holds a white bowl filled with ice and three opened oysters, garnished with herbs. A large white ferry travels across calm water at sunset near the West Seattle neighborhood, with distant mountains and a hazy orange sky in the background. In The Junction commercial district, pick up a scoop at the new location of the small-batch ice cream empire **Molly Moon’s**, and savor rich, aromatic lattes and teas on the patio at **Hotwire Coffeehouse**. Pair creative sandwiches with coffee and beer at **Freshy’s**, and drop by **Snapdragon West Seattle** for plant-based dishes and flaky baked goods. Stop by **Alki Surf Shop** for apparel, sunglasses, Frisbees, and other necessities for the perfect day at the beach, and **Alki Bike & Board** for cycling and skating gear. The Sunday morning **West Seattle Farmers Market** is a favorite destination for people-watching and scooping up fresh berries, baked goods, and gifts.

This coastal neighborhood is home to Alki Beach, a popular spot for sunbathing, beach volleyball, and stunning views of the Seattle skyline across Elliott Bay. Just up the hill, California Avenue houses a wealth of local shops, pubs, and eateries that capture the friendly, laid-back atmosphere of the area. While visiting Seattle we took the Water Taxi to West Seattle to see West Seattle Junction described as "a clutch of quirky boutiques, shops and restaurants." All this really feels like is the Main Street of a very average small town.
